title: lithocarpus xylocarpus
intro: Lithocarpus xylocarpus, also known as the Bur Oak or Lithocarpus, is a deciduous tree species native to China and Southeast Asia. Its bark, leaves, and fruits are used in traditional medicine, with reported medicinal properties including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus xylocarpus are said to include reducing fever, relieving coughs, and aiding in digestion, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Lithocarpus xylocarpus is often prepared as a decoction or tea, and its herbal preparations are also used in the form of infusions, tinctures, and capsules, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
